input: Bharat Startup Grand Challenge (BSGC) 2026 is a DPIIT-approved national initiative designed to identify and scale high-impact indigenous innovations. Key tracks include Digital & FinTech Inclusion, Agri-Tech, and Healthcare. Selected startups receive grants up to ₹5 Lakh, expert mentorship, and incubation support. Open to startups at all stages from idea to early revenue.
expected_output: DPIIT-approved national initiative for scaling innovations
Features tracks like Digital & FinTech Inclusion
Grants up to ₹5 Lakh plus mentorship and incubation
Open to idea stage to early revenue startups

input: HDFC Bank launched the FY26 edition of its Parivartan Start-up Grants programme. The bank has committed INR 20 crore in non-dilutive grants to support around 50 startups. Focus areas include financial inclusion, MSME innovation, and AI-driven social technology. Individual grants range up to ₹50 Lakh for selected startups through partner incubators.
expected_output: HDFC Bank CSR grant program (FY26 edition)
Non-dilutive grants up to ₹50 Lakh per startup
Focus on financial inclusion and MSME innovation
Mentorship provided through partner incubators

input: FutureX AI is the second edition of Campus Fund's student startup platform, run with Google Cloud. It provides India's biggest platform for student-led AI startups. Selected teams receive investment up to $1,000,000 from Campus Fund and Google Cloud credits through the Google for Startups Cloud Program.
expected_output: India's biggest platform for student-led AI startups
Investment up to $1,000,000 from Campus Fund
Google Cloud credits through Google for Startups Cloud Program

input: Early-stage and growth-stage biotech startups can participate in this nationwide challenge by Thermo Fisher Scientific. Must be registered with DPIIT.
expected_output: Nationwide challenge by Thermo Fisher Scientific
For early-stage and growth-stage biotech startups
Must be registered with DPIIT

input: Global competition for sustainable fashion innovations by designers and startups. Seed funding and mentorship offered through the R|Elan Circular Design Challenge.
expected_output: Global competition for sustainable fashion innovations
Open to designers and startups
Seed funding and mentorship offered

input: Amazon Saheli Accelerate is a women-focused accelerator program that provides mentorship and support to e-commerce startups in India.
expected_output: Women-focused accelerator program
Provides mentorship and support
For e-commerce startups in India

input: A startup competition focused on food security and sustainability, with a grant of up to ₹45 Lakhs. Open to idea stage startups globally by the World Food Prize Foundation.
expected_output: Competition focused on food security and sustainability
Grant of up to ₹45 Lakhs
Open to idea stage startups globally

input: BioNEST Incubation Program at FITT IIT Delhi supported by BIRAC. Biotech incubation for innovators at ideation to early prototype stages.
expected_output: Biotech incubation at FITT IIT Delhi
Supported by BIRAC
For innovators at ideation to early prototype stages

input: VJTI TBI DeepTech Incubator is an incubation program for startups in energy, EVs, semiconductors, IoT, AI/ML, and cybersecurity in Mumbai, India.
expected_output: DeepTech incubation program at VJTI Mumbai
Covers energy, EVs, semiconductors, IoT, AI/ML, and cybersecurity
Based in Mumbai, India

input: Accelerator for AI-first startups in India, Seed to Series A. Equity-free program by Google for Startups.
expected_output: Equity-free accelerator by Google for Startups
For AI-first startups in India
Seed to Series A stage

input: Tamil Nadu Technology Hub is a deep tech accelerator for startups in Tier 2/3 cities of Tamil Nadu. Requires TRL 3+ readiness.
expected_output: Deep tech accelerator in Tamil Nadu
For startups in Tier 2/3 cities
Requires TRL 3+ readiness

input: BIRAC LEAP Fund at IIT Delhi provides funding for biotech and medtech startups up to ₹70L. Equity funding for startups in the biotech and medtech sectors.
expected_output: Funding up to ₹70 Lakhs for biotech and medtech startups
BIRAC LEAP Fund at IIT Delhi
Equity funding model
